case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. GERSON JURADO et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JURADO, GERSON SANCHEZ, ANTONIO JR. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1404 E STURGEON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,527.30 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,527.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JURADO, GERSON SANCHEZ, ANTONIO JR. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1404 E STURGEON ST. S.F. CA. 94130, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JURADO, GERSON SANCHEZ, ANTONIO JR.
ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED OCT-28-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JURADO, GERSON SANCHEZ, ANTONIO JR.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT JURADO, GERSON SANCHEZ, ANTONIO JR.
